summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SLS Fleet Management System MVP. All core features working perfectly including authentication, dashboard metrics, vehicle CRUD operations, approval workflow, and role-based access control. Professional corporate design implemented with proper color scheme.
passed_tests: Dashboard metrics display (vehicles, drivers, tenders, approvals)
Vehicle creation form with all required fields
Professional corporate design with blues/grays color scheme
Document management with expiry date tracking
Status badges and approval workflow integration
